title: Smoke: Reimagined
description: Smoke: Reimagined is a feature-rich Create-based modpack for Forge 1.20.1, combining over 100 mods focused on automation, exploration, and quality-of-life improvements. Perfect for players who want a deeper and more immersive Create experience.
body:
## Welcome to **Smoke: Reimagined** 
a fresh twist on the beloved **Create 5** experience — now with tons of **addons**, **immersive features**, and **quality-of-life improvements** to take your gameplay to the next level!

Whether you’re a builder, an adventurer, a redstone engineer, or a modded Minecraft veteran – this pack has something for everyone.

## What's Inside?
This pack brings together a rich selection of Create-based addons, visual enhancements, tech mods, and exploration upgrades to offer an engaging and polished experience.

## Full Modlist
Create (+ dozens of addons)

Let's Do Bakery / Brewery / Candlelight / Vinery / Furniture

Ad Astra + Create Recipes

ComputerCraft: Tweaked

Chunk Loaders & Chunky

SecurityCraft

Jade

Just Zoom

Travelers Backpack

FancyMenu + Drippy Loading Screen

GraveStone

VillagersPlus

Dungeons & Taverns
(...and many more – over 100 mods in total!)
